description: A compliance auditor performs a safety audit of a manufacturing plant.

nodes.task_description: Perform a physical walkthrough of the plant to identify any immediate safety hazards.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor observes that several emergency exits are partially blocked.

nodes.task_description: Review the plant's injury and illness logs to identify any trends.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor finds a high number of back injuries in the shipping department.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all forklift operators have a current, valid certification.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor reviews training records and confirms all operators are certified.
